tool_calls.input:
{"code":"(def merged-prs (github__list_pull_requests {:state "merged"}))

(def prs-with-linear-closes (filter (fn [pr] (and (contains? pr :closes_linear) (not (nil? (:closes_linear pr))))) merged-prs))

(def linear-ids (map :closes_linear prs-with-linear-closes))

(defn get-linear-issue [id]
  (linear__get_issue {:id id}))

(def linear-issues (map get-linear-issue linear-ids))
